news.title: Divis Lab receives Rs. 571 crore draft order for FY23 from IT Dept.
news.summary: Divis Lab receives Rs. 571 crore draft order for FY23 from IT Dept.

news.title:
Draft order proposes Rs.570.5 crore addition for FY22-23 due to transfer pricing adjustments.
Penalty proceedings likely for underreporting income; Divis Labs plans to appeal the draft order.
news.summary:
Draft order proposes Rs.570.5 crore addition for FY22-23 due to transfer pricing adjustments.
Penalty proceedings likely for underreporting income; Divis Labs plans to appeal the draft order.

news.title:
Jefferies retains Buy on Divi's Laboratories with a target of ₹8,200, citing GLP and peptide CDMO scaling.
Projected FY32 revenue: $600m (oral GLP) + $400m (injectable GLP); FY26–32E revenue/EPS growth ~15%/20%.
news.summary:
Jefferies retains Buy on Divi's Laboratories with a target of ₹8,200, citing GLP and peptide CDMO scaling.
Projected FY32 revenue: $600m (oral GLP) + $400m (injectable GLP); FY26–32E revenue/EPS growth ~15%/20%.

news.title:
Divi's Laboratories sees NSE block trade worth Rs. 56.5 crore.
Approx. 89,698 shares traded at Rs. 6,302.5 per share.
news.summary:
Divi's Laboratories sees NSE block trade worth Rs. 56.5 crore.
Approx. 89,698 shares traded at Rs. 6,302.5 per share.

news.title:
Divi's Laboratories executed a block trade of ~79,936 shares at Rs. 6,296.
The transaction amounted to Rs. 50.3 crores on NSE.
news.summary:
Divi's Laboratories executed a block trade of ~79,936 shares at Rs. 6,296.
The transaction amounted to Rs. 50.3 crores on NSE.

news.title:
Divis Labs discussed stable generics with volume growth in Q3 FY26 call.
Custom synthesis, peptide projects progressing; highlighted labor code impact and ₹74 cr one-time item.
news.summary:
Divis Labs discussed stable generics with volume growth in Q3 FY26 call.
Custom synthesis, peptide projects progressing; highlighted labor code impact and ₹74 cr one-time item.

news.title:
Divi's Laboratories reported a 30% MoM decline in CO exports.
The drop raises concerns about the company's international sales performance.
news.summary:
Divi's Laboratories reported a 30% MoM decline in CO exports.
The drop raises concerns about the company's international sales performance.

news.title:
Divi's Labs plans custom synthesis projects, targeting commercial volumes by 2027.
The company aims for a gross asset turnover ratio of 1.5-1.8 in 4-5 years.
news.summary:
Divi's Labs plans custom synthesis projects, targeting commercial volumes by 2027.
The company aims for a gross asset turnover ratio of 1.5-1.8 in 4-5 years.

news.title:
Divi's Labs expects raw material pricing and availability to remain stable for six months.
The nutraceuticals segment is projected to maintain strong growth performance.
news.summary:
Divi's Labs expects raw material pricing and availability to remain stable for six months.
The nutraceuticals segment is projected to maintain strong growth performance.

news.title: Goldman Sachs retains 'Neutral' rating for Divis Lab, revises target price to Rs 6,050.
news.summary: Goldman Sachs retains 'Neutral' rating for Divis Lab, revises target price to Rs 6,050.

news.title: Divi's Laboratories Q3 revenue rose to ₹26B from ₹23B YoY.
news.summary: Divi's Laboratories Q3 revenue rose to ₹26B from ₹23B YoY.

news.title:
Divi's Laboratories missed Q3 profit estimates due to high raw material costs.
A one-off labour charge from India's labour code changes also impacted profits.
news.summary:
Divi's Laboratories missed Q3 profit estimates due to high raw material costs.
A one-off labour charge from India's labour code changes also impacted profits.

news.title:
Divis Laboratories experiences a slowdown in major API opportunities.
Despite the slowdown, Divis remains a key supplier for these APIs.
news.summary:
Divis Laboratories experiences a slowdown in major API opportunities.
Despite the slowdown, Divis remains a key supplier for these APIs.

news.title: Divi's Laboratories reported a 49% MoM rise in exports, reaching $117m in December.
news.summary: Divi's Laboratories reported a 49% MoM rise in exports, reaching $117m in December.

news.title:
Divi's Laboratories executed a block trade for ~103,549 shares at Rs. 6,424.5.
The transaction totaled Rs. 66.53 crores on the NSE.
news.summary:
Divi's Laboratories executed a block trade for ~103,549 shares at Rs. 6,424.5.
The transaction totaled Rs. 66.53 crores on the NSE.

news.title:
HDFC Securities initiates coverage on Divi's Labs, Sai Life, Piramal Pharma, Anthem Bio, and Laurus Labs.
India's CRDMO market is poised to outpace APAC, with strong long-term growth in pharma sector.
news.summary:
HDFC Securities initiates coverage on Divi's Labs, Sai Life, Piramal Pharma, Anthem Bio, and Laurus Labs.
India's CRDMO market is poised to outpace APAC, with strong long-term growth in pharma sector.

news.title: DivisLab shares climbed over 4% intraday after a positive brokerage report.
news.summary: DivisLab shares climbed over 4% intraday after a positive brokerage report.

news.title: Morgan Stanley rates Divi's Laboratories overweight with a price target of Rs 7541.
news.summary: Morgan Stanley rates Divi's Laboratories overweight with a price target of Rs 7541.

news.title: Divi's Laboratories reports 68% MoM and 17% YoY growth in exports in USD terms.
news.summary: Divi's Laboratories reports 68% MoM and 17% YoY growth in exports in USD terms.

news.title:
Indian Pharma stocks surged on Friday, with Nifty Pharma index gaining over 1% post US BIOSECURE Act inclusion in NDAA.
Wockhardt led gains (+6.5%), followed by Divi's, Laurus Labs, Aurobindo, and Biocon (2-3.5%). Macquarie prefers Divi's and Syngene.
news.summary:
Indian Pharma stocks surged on Friday, with Nifty Pharma index gaining over 1% post US BIOSECURE Act inclusion in NDAA.
Wockhardt led gains (+6.5%), followed by Divi's, Laurus Labs, Aurobindo, and Biocon (2-3.5%). Macquarie prefers Divi's and Syngene.
